title: Senior Software Engineer - Zomato Holdings Services - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Zomato Holdings Services - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Zomato Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Faridabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zomato Holdings Services:
Zomato Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Holdings Services!
